commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=4f5e8e266e621c97cfdfcf2b8f77ebcdd674ebdd)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds Windows `schtasks /Change /DISABLE` after `stopScheduledTask` cleanup and `schtasks /Change /ENABLE` before `restartScheduledTask` runs the task.

PR surface: Source +4. Total +4 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: the linked issue describes a legacy repeated Windows Scheduled Task, and current `openclaw update` stops the managed service before package install while Windows stop currently only calls `/End`. I did not run a native Windows Task Scheduler repro in this read-only pass.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed because the patch changes Windows service lifecycle semantics and the external PR still needs real Windows proof; automation should not take over without maintainer direction.
commands.reason: comment version already processed in ledger
